libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Generate or adapt tests against APIs actually present in org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1. Do not add pekko-actor-typed_2.13 just to restore org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps; that artifact provides the newer org.apache.pekko.actor.typed API and does not contain the removed legacy classes.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.1.5 tests that import org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, or TypedProps will not compile against 2.0.0-M1.

If tests deliberately exercise Pekko DNS internals, they may still need the existing --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED JVM/native-image argument, but this is not required for basic meaningful actor coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or required environment setup is needed; the failure is caused by tests using legacy TypedActor APIs that are absent from pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1, not by missing setup.
